shared_properties: Vent footprint remains 16x16 px with a gridded stone housing aligned to the dungeon tile grid.
Core palette metadata remains primary #3B3347, background #0D0D0F, and accent #E07B39 while airflow colors stay inside specs.colors_hex.
Air direction always reads downward through vertical streaks rather than radial bursts.
differences: Four frames animate bright airflow streaks and grille highlights to indicate a 200 px per second downward force field.
Slick-blue wind channels occupy the central 6 px column and pulse every other frame for readability.
Stone casing remains static while only inner flow lines animate so collision interpretation stays stable.

reference_images.label: gdd_markdown
reference_images.purpose: Grounds the 16x16 wind vent, downward acceleration rule, and late-run environmental hazard behavior.

reference_images.label: moodboard
reference_images.purpose: Grounds the damp dungeon ambience and cool-color accent used for non-contact environmental forces.

reference_images.label: player_concept
reference_images.purpose: Grounds player scale so the airflow opening feels aligned to the 16x24 prisoner body width.

bevy_constraints.bundle_strategy: SpriteBundle for static hazards or SpriteSheetBundle for animated hazards, all rendered with nearest-neighbor sampling.
bevy_constraints.asset_loading: Load hazard textures and atlases during the shared Loading state and expose handles through HazardVisualRegistry keyed by asset_key.
runtime_notes: Keep collision volumes in gameplay components rather than inferring them from visual pixels.
Align every hazard origin to the 16x16 grid unless the authored size is 24x24 or 48x16 by design.
Use visibility toggles or atlas index changes instead of runtime texture swaps to avoid hitching during repeated descent loops.

context.usage: Environmental block that accelerates the player downward inside abyss routes.

flow_notes: Central vent slot is 6 px wide and occupies x5-x10.
Each frame includes at least two vertical airflow streaks from y3 to y13.
Outer casing keeps a 1 px outline on all four edges.

acceptance_criteria: Sprite sheet is exactly 64x16 px with 4 frames of 16x16 px and 0 px spacing.
Every frame preserves a static 16x16 casing while only airflow lines and inner glow pixels change.
Airflow colors include #4A90A4 or #8FA8B8 in every frame so the force source is readable without text.
